verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All the flowers are All of our tomorrow Are in the seeds today In the seeds we’re sowing.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For the words you speak Are little seeds When they’re planted, they will grow And you’ll reap every seed that you sow.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Our words can justify us Or condemn us on that day So why not say what God says And sow the seed the right way.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Words of hate can kill Words of love can heal Words can make one glad And words can make one cry.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And you’ll reap every seed That you sow.
